name: Ngrok
description: Ngrok tunnel backend. Implements the @elizaos/plugin-tunnel ITunnelService contract; coexists with plugin-tunnel, plugin-tailscale, and Eliza Cloud headscale via first-active-wins.

NGROK_AUTH_TOKEN.label: Auth Token
NGROK_AUTH_TOKEN.help: Ngrok auth token. Required for stable tunnels and custom domains. Get one from https://dashboard.ngrok.com/get-started/your-authtoken

NGROK_REGION.label: Region
NGROK_REGION.help: Ngrok edge region (us, eu, ap, au, sa, jp, in).

NGROK_DOMAIN.label: Custom Domain
NGROK_DOMAIN.help: Reserved ngrok domain (paid feature). Leave blank for an auto-generated *.ngrok.io URL.

NGROK_SUBDOMAIN.label: Subdomain
NGROK_SUBDOMAIN.help: Reserved subdomain (paid feature, alternative to NGROK_DOMAIN).

NGROK_DEFAULT_PORT.label: Default Port
NGROK_DEFAULT_PORT.help: Local port to tunnel when none is given in the prompt.
